highlights.title: Zhipu’s Chinese Founder Says Frontier AI Should Stay Open to All
highlights.description: The founder of Chinese AI lab Zhipu argued that frontier artificial intelligence should remain broadly accessible rather than controlled by select individuals, weighing in on a growing debate about the risks posed by ever more powerful models.

highlights.title: Ripple once weighed shutting down and handing XRP to shareholders, CEO says
highlights.description: Ripple's Brad Garlinghouse says he and co-founder Chris Larsen considered winding the company down and handing its XRP to shareholders before deciding to fight the 2020 lawsuit.
